g.text: Verdict (no tie — judged on
persuasiveness)
Winner
Pro score
Con score
CON
Both sides argued at a high level — every turn carried a cited source, rebutted the prior point,
and introduced a new line, so clarity and evidence-use were near-even. PRO ran a disciplined and
memorable thesis ('harm is a solvable design problem, not the medium's nature') and landed
several clean counters: catching CON quoting only the warning half of the Surgeon General
advisory while deleting its identity-affirming benefits (ping 10), exposing the MIT virality
stat as relative-within-cascades spread versus the 0.15% actual media-diet figure (ping 7), and
the sharp 'you found the fix and called it the disease' turn on the Science reranking study
(ping 5). These are strong rhetorical-force moments. CON, however, won the rebuttal dimension —
the decisive category — by repeatedly converting PRO's own evidence into liabilities rather than
merely countering it: PRO's 'load-bearing infrastructure' became 'infrastructure you cannot
leave is where structural harm becomes inescapable' (ping 4); PRO's celebrated GDPR fines were
pinned as a 'parking ticket... paid off before lunch' with the one-week-of-revenue figure (ping
8); PRO's creator-economy jobs claim was answered with concrete distributional data (46% under
$1,000, median income falling) reframing it as 'a lottery sold as a career' (ping 8); and PRO's
crisis-rescue point was turned with same-disaster misinformation data — 'you only counted the
rescues' (ping 10). CON's strongest blow was the Meta unsealed-documents turn (ping 5): it
directly answered PRO's recurring 'the dial is adjustable' refrain with 'the dial stays cranked
to harm because harm pays,' neutralizing the design-fixability frame PRO leaned on most. PRO
never fully recovered that frame thereafter. On the four dimensions CON edges clarity-tie,
matches evidence, and clearly leads rebuttal quality through sustained jiu-jitsu of the
opponent's material; PRO leads marginally on a couple of rhetorical flourishes. Net differential
to CON, decided on rebuttal quality.
